description: Configure the bridge computer's Chrome browser for an ultra-low-bandwidth, high-latency satellite internet connection (e.g., Iridium Certus). Remove the 8 high-bandwidth entertainment bookmarks (YouTube, Netflix, Spotify, Instagram, TikTok, Twitch, Hulu, Disney+). Organize the remaining 20 maritime bookmarks into three new folders on the bookmark bar: 'Weather & Tides', 'Port & Coast Guard', and 'Vessel Operations'. Disable image loading and page preloading. Set the browser startup behavior to open the New Tab page. Add a custom site search engine with the keyword 'buoy' and the URL 'https://www.ndbc.noaa.gov/station_page.php?station=%s'. Finally, enable the 'Show Saved Copy Button' and 'Back-forward cache' flags, and disable the 'Experimental QUIC protocol' flag.
